summary: Verified fix for Admin Dashboard showing all zeros. The fix was to update Analytics.js to use /admin/analytics/overview endpoint instead of /admin/users which returns paginated response. All stats now display correctly: Total Users=111, Active Users=85, Pending KYC=2, Transactions=79, Total Volume=29,257,373.54 EUR
passed_tests: Backend: Admin login endpoint (/api/v1/auth/login) works correctly
Backend: /admin/analytics/overview returns 200 OK with correct data structure
Backend: Analytics overview returns users stats (total=111, active=85)
Backend: Analytics overview returns KYC stats (pending=2, approved=58)
Backend: Analytics overview returns transfer stats with volume_cents (total=79, volume=2925737354)
Backend: Analytics overview values are NOT all zeros (BUG FIX VERIFIED)
Backend: /admin/users correctly returns paginated response with users array
Backend: /admin/kyc/pending returns list of pending applications
Backend: Invalid login correctly rejected with 401
Frontend: Admin login flow works
Frontend: Overview tab displays all 5 KPI stat tiles
Frontend: Total Users stat shows 111
Frontend: Active Users stat shows 85
Frontend: Pending KYC stat shows 2
Frontend: Transactions stat shows 79
Frontend: Total Volume stat shows 29.257.373,54 EUR
Frontend: User Growth chart renders
Frontend: Monthly Transactions chart renders
Frontend: User Status pie chart renders
Frontend: KYC Status pie chart renders
Regression: Users list page works (shows 111 users)
Regression: KYC Queue page works (shows 2 pending applications)
Regression: Transfers Queue page works (shows pending transfers)

fix_verification.bug_description: Admin Dashboard was showing all zeros for statistics (Total Users, Active Users, Pending KYC, Transactions)
fix_verification.root_cause: Analytics.js was calling /admin/users expecting an array response, but endpoint now returns {users: [...], pagination: {...}}
fix_verification.fix_applied: Updated Analytics.js fetchAnalytics() to use /admin/analytics/overview endpoint which provides comprehensive aggregated stats
fix_verification.backend_enhancement: Enhanced get_admin_analytics_overview() to include approved KYC count and volume_cents for total transaction volume

seed_data_creation: No test data created - used existing admin credentials and live production data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Dashboard analytics fix verified working. The fix changed Analytics.js to use /admin/analytics/overview endpoint. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_admin_analytics.py covers: analytics endpoint structure, data validation, pagination response format, and auth endpoints. All existing admin features (Users, KYC Queue, Transfers Queue) work correctly.
